narrative:
Northwest Local Sd (Hamilton) school district has 54,761 registered voters, with 55.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.3%, a modest Republican lean of 5.8 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +2.3% D−R vs -17.4% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
